title: AppleSkin + Sapixcraft Mod Support
description: 🔶 AppleSkin compatibility for Sapixcraft - with 3 color variants
body:
## Want to use **Sapixcraft** together with [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)?

If the default **golden saturation icons** feel out of place next to Sapixcraft's hunger bar, this patch fixes that.

This resource pack replaces AppleSkin’s saturation icons with Sapixcraft-styled versions, so everything matches properly.
![Appleskin pack icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9fc5399e03b406c45c85ed0dc6d65f4591d7731_0.webp)

### You can choose between **three styles**:
#### Normal yellow

![normal icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fd52835e748503bbc7431895f0fc0861d168477.webp)

#### Orange

![orange icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/267525ba36bb64dcb151537cac5f80130d5159df_0.webp)

#### Gradient fatigue meter

![gradient fatigue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f21dde00e1734ca7f0658290c1eb9db214a5b6b.webp)


***
**Load order:** place this mod patch **above** Sapixcraft.

![load order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23c2ea7ba891c0c994530d3bcfb9473b5aea2236_0.webp)
***

This pack is designed specifically to use with [**Sapixcraft**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sapixcraft) and [**AppleSkin**](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) mod.

---
---
